channel.title: re3dprinting/re3d-klipper-os
channel.description: An OS that includes Klipper firmware and additional dependencies needed to operate the re:3D Gigabot printers.

item.title: re:3D Klipper OS v1.4.0 Update
item.description: re:3D Klipper OS v1.4.0 is now available! To learn more and upgrade your system, visit: https://github.com/re3Dprinting/re3D-Klipper-OS/releases
